name: llm-transpile
description: Auto-compress .md, .html, .txt files read by coding agents via PreToolUse hook.

interface.shortDescription: Token-optimized document reader — cuts context usage by up to 40%.
interface.longDescription: Silently compresses .md, .html, and .txt files on Read via PreToolUse hook, cutting context usage by up to 40% with zero workflow change.
